serverNameMaxLength: Server name must be 100 characters or less
serverDescriptionPlaceholder: Tell people what this server is about
descriptionMaxLength: Description must be 500 characters or less
deleteServerWarning: Deleting a server is permanent and cannot be undone. All channels, messages, and members will be lost.
rolesDescription: Change member roles and manage permissions.
transferOwnershipWarning: This will make the selected member the server owner. You will be demoted to admin. This action cannot be undone.
slowModeTooltip: Slow mode — minimum time between messages
privateChannelHelp: Only selected roles can see this channel.
readOnlyChannelHelp: Only admins and above can send messages.
insufficientPermissions: You do not have permission to view this section.
readOnlyOverviewDescription: Only admins can edit server settings.
displayNameHelp: Leave blank to use your username.
displayNameMaxLength: Display name must be 32 characters or less
customStatusMaxLength: Custom status must be 128 characters or less
bioPlaceholder: Tell people a bit about yourself. Links are supported.
bioHelp: Links are supported; other formatting is shown as plain text.
bioMaxLength: Bio must be 190 characters or less
avatarHelp: PNG, JPEG, WebP or GIF — max 5MB (GIF max 2MB).
bannerHelp: Wide image — max 2MB. Downscaled for you.
bannerRemoveFailed: Could not remove your banner. Try again.
profileUpdateFailed: Could not save your profile. Try again.
avatarRemoveFailed: Could not remove your avatar. Try again.
avatarErrorInvalidType: Avatar must be a PNG, JPEG, WebP or GIF image.
avatarErrorGifTooLarge: Animated GIF avatars must be 2MB or less.
avatarErrorProcessingFailed: Could not process this image. Try a different file.
bannerErrorInvalidType: Banner must be a PNG, JPEG, WebP or GIF image.
bannerErrorProcessingFailed: Could not process this image. Try a different file.
notifDesktopHelp: Get a native notification when a message arrives while Harmony is in the background.
notifPermissionDenied: Notifications are blocked by your browser. Allow them for this site in your browser settings, then reload.
notifPermissionUnsupported: Desktop notifications are not supported in this browser.
notifDndActive: Do Not Disturb is on — all notifications are muted.
notifBannerText: Enable desktop notifications to know when someone messages you.
